{
  "perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor",
  "vote": "yes",
  "amendment_if_yes_amended": null,
  "rationale": "Stale code-index resync (C) is an upstream root cause contaminating all subsequent P0 verdicts. Without validated index, OPTIONS A/B are based on polluted data, creating constitutional integrity risks. Fixing C first ensures downstream actions are grounded in current reality.",
  "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delaying C creates cascading failures: corrupted courier-loop analysis (A), unverified Law 2 violations (B), and irreversible constitutional breaches. Stale data risks entire ecosystem compliance.",
  "constitutional_violations_detected": "Yes",
  "whistleblower_flag": "null"
}
rationale: Stale code-index resync (C) is an upstream root cause contaminating all subsequent P0 verdicts. Without validated index, OPTIONS A/B are based on polluted data, creating constitutional integrity risks. Fixing C first ensures downstream actions are grounded in current reality.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delaying C creates cascading failures: corrupted courier-loop analysis (A), unverified Law 2 violations (B), and irreversible constitutional breaches. Stale data risks entire ecosystem compliance.
